meta.title: SwiftBill — UAE FTA Invoice App | Professional Invoicing for UAE
meta.description: Create invoices following UAE FTA guidelines with TRN display, VAT breakdown, and bilingual English/Arabic support. The #1 invoicing app for UAE freelancers and businesses.

hero.title: UAE FTA invoices
hero.subtitle: Professional invoices following UAE Federal Tax Authority guidelines with TRN display, VAT breakdown, and bilingual support. Built for freelancers and businesses in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and all Emirates.

features.subtitle: Whether you're a freelancer in Dubai, a contractor in Abu Dhabi, or a consultant anywhere in the UAE — SwiftBill handles invoices, expenses, and FTA formatting so you focus on your work.
